chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. S-1194 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing of Case. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.11.2025. Mr. Irfan Aziz, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Ali Zardari, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Inspector Ch. Javed Akhtar, PHQ, South Zone, ASI Rao Shahid, SHO M. Aslam, PS Zaman Town, Karachi and DSP Raza Mian, Legal II CPO ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for the petitioner through instant petition seeks following relief:- i) Direct the Official Respondents to provide protection to the Petitioner, as well as all family members and his staff i.e Manager Asad and Manager Ali Ghazi from the hands of Respondents No. 06 to 08. ii) Direct the Official Respondents to take action against the Respondents No. 06 to 08 in accordance with law. iii) Restrain the Respondents No. 06 to 08 from harassing the Petitioner as well as all family members and his staff i.e Manager Asad and Manager Ali Ghazi. iv) Any other relief(s), which this Hon'ble Court may deem fit and proper. Pursuant to court notices official respondent Nos.2, 5 7 & 8 have filed their comments, which are taken on record, wherein it is undertaken that no harassment would be caused to the petitioner. Mr. Shahzad Ishaque, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.6 and state at bar that respondent No.6 will not cause any harassment to the petitioner. Learned AAG and DPG submits that in terms of prayer clause official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and no harassment would be caused to the petitioner.

Shahzad Ishaque, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.6 and state at bar that respondent No.6 will not cause any harassment to the petitioner. Learned AAG and DPG submits that in terms of prayer clause official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and no harassment would be caused to the petitioner. Counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the instant petition in view of the reply filed by the official respondents and statement made by the AAG & DPG. Order accordingly. A copy of this order shall be sent to SSP (East) Karachi for compliance. JUDGE
